raw_pages.title: Menu Doodle | Smart Digital QR Code Menus for Restaurants
raw_pages.body: Menu Doodle | Smart Digital QR Code Menus for Restaurants

business_summary.description: Menu Doodle provides smart digital QR code menu solutions for restaurants. Their platform enables dining establishments to transition from physical menus to interactive, mobile-friendly digital versions.
pain_points_solved: High cost of printing physical menus
Difficulty updating menu items and pricing in real-time
Hygiene concerns related to shared physical menus
business_summary.missing_info: Specific pricing tiers, advanced feature set (e.g., ordering/payment integration), and company location.

topic_candidates.title: How to Update Your Restaurant Menu in Seconds: A Guide for Busy Managers
topic_candidates.score_reason: Directly addresses the pain point of manual menu updates with a clear solution.

topic_candidates.title: 5 Hidden Costs of Traditional Paper Menus You Can Eliminate Today
topic_candidates.target_audience: Restaurant owners looking to cut overhead
topic_candidates.score_reason: Strong financial hook that highlights the ROI of switching to digital.

topic_candidates.title: Contactless Dining: Why Modern Customers Expect QR Code Menus
topic_candidates.score_reason: Positions the product as a necessary modern standard rather than a luxury.

topic_candidates.title: From Print to Pixel: A Step-by-Step Guide to Digitizing Your Menu
topic_candidates.target_audience: Small business owners transitioning to digital
topic_candidates.score_reason: Provides a clear, actionable path for prospects to adopt the platform.

topic_candidates.title: How Dynamic Pricing Can Increase Your Restaurant's Profit Margins
topic_candidates.target_audience: Restaurant owners focused on revenue management
topic_candidates.score_reason: Connects software capabilities directly to business profitability.

topic_candidates.title: Case Study: How The Bistro Reduced Printing Expenses by 70% in One Year
topic_candidates.score_reason: Provides tangible ROI data which is highly persuasive for B2B buyers.

topic_candidates.title: Hygiene and Hospitality: Why Shared Menus Are Becoming Obsolete
topic_candidates.score_reason: Addresses a specific pain point regarding hygiene and customer comfort.

topic_candidates.title: 7 Features Your Digital Menu Must Have to Drive More Orders
topic_candidates.score_reason: Educates the user on why interactive menus outperform static PDFs.

topic_candidates.title: Troubleshooting Common Issues When Switching to QR Code Menus
topic_candidates.score_reason: Reduces friction for prospects who are worried about the technical transition.

topic_candidates.title: How to Design a Digital Menu That Increases Upselling
topic_candidates.target_audience: Restaurant owners looking to increase average ticket size
topic_candidates.score_reason: Focuses on the revenue-generating potential of the software.
